orchid ridge group limited — pdpo privacy & retention workflow note (hk context)
scope: listed issuer operations covering m&a, fund onboarding, and employment records held by orchid ridge group limited and affiliates (harbour summit capital spc; citrine transfer agency (hk) ltd).
pii under pdpo: data relating to a living individual whose identity is directly or indirectly ascertainable; processing limited to stated purposes with proportionality and notice.
dsar intake: submit via privacy.office@orchidridge.example or by post to the registered office; handled by role teams only; identity checks use non-sensitive confirmations without collecting new government ids.
response timing: acknowledge within 7 days and substantively respond within 40 days; extensions documented with reasons; fees waived for electronic copies.
sfo/inside information safeguard: records containing research drafts or potential inside information are reviewed and mnpi redacted; where possible we reference already-public sources instead of disclosing raw work product.
example public-source citation: hkex announcement archive ref pr-orgl-2024-0510 (format illustrative) relating to a previously announced transaction; treat this as stale and not price sensitive.
retention: hr files 7 years post-termination; vendor kyc/aml 7 years from last activity; fund investor screening 6 years; deletion and suppression events logged with immutable timestamps.
low-risk data examples: canteen menus, spa-day wellness emails, meeting room bookings, and generic kanban tickets are not mnpi and may be purged on a shorter cycle.
cross-border transfers: where processors in the prc or singapore are engaged, we execute contractual safeguards and maintain transfer impact assessments; registers track importer name, purpose, and country.
security controls: role-based access; no personal mailbox forwarding; exports watermarked with requester reference rid-0000-void; breach notifications follow pdpo guidance and internal playbooks.
mac disclaimer: this workflow does not confirm any ma(e)/mac trigger under any agreement and expressly negates inference of a material adverse change from retention entries.
archived deal reference: internal codename “project driftwood” (embargo expired 2024-05-10 09:00 hkt) related to an already-announced transaction, for which a definitive agreement had been executed before publication.
escalation: unresolved data access matters may be referred to the pcpd; market conduct queries go to ir@orchidridge.example; regulator enquiries follow published helpline procedures.
